mapper.select: /* SQL ID : UserPrfilDAO.userPrfilSelect 설 명 : 사용자의 정보 조회 */ SELECT USER_ID , USER_RPRS_ID , USERNM , USER_ENNM , ORG_ID , DEPT_ID , PHOTO_FILE_ID , SHRTNT_ALIM_RCVYN , EML_ALIM_RCVYN , PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG , USE_EML_GBNCD , USER_NCNM , STDNT_NO , GNDR_TYCD , USER_ID_ENCPSWD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND LANG_CD = NVL(#{langCd}, 'ko') AND UP_CD = 'GNDR_TYCD') AS GNDR_TYNM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 4, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PUSH_RCVYN -- 푸시(4) , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 6, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ALIM_TALK_RCVYN -- 알림톡(6) , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 1, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SMS_RCVYN -- 문자(1) , (SELECT MAX(CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT T1 WHERE T1.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND T1.CNTCT_TYCD = 'LNKG_EML') AS LNKG_EML , (SELECT MAX(CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT T1 WHERE T1.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND T1.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS INDV_EML , (SELECT MAX(CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT T1 WHERE T1.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND T1.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS MBL_PHN FROM TB_LMS_USER USR WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
/* SQL ID : UserPrfilDAO.pushTalkSmsFlagSelect 설 명 : 푸시톡문자수신플래그 조회 */ SELECT PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : UserPrfilDAO.modifyUserPrfil 설 명 : 사용자프로필 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USER SET USERNM = #{usernm} -- 사용자명 , USER_NCNM = #{userNcnm} -- 사용자별칭 , GNDR_TYCD = #{gndrTycd} -- 성별유형코드 , USE_EML_GBNCD = #{useEmlGbncd} -- 사용이메일구분코드(LNKG/INDV) , PHOTO_FILE_ID = #{photoFileId} , MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} -- 수정자아이디 , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() -- 수정일시 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql: SELECT AUTHRT.AUTHRT_CD , AUTHRT.AUTHRT_GRPCD , USER_AUTHRT.AUTHRT_ID , ORG.ORG_ID , ORG.ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT USER_AUTHRT JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT AUTHRT ON AUTHRT.AUTHRT_ID = USER_AUTHRT.AUTHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USER_AUTHRT.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON AUTHRT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID WHERE 1=1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : UserPrfilDAO.authrtList 설 명 : 권한조회 */

/* SQL ID : UserPrfilDAO.nowSmstrLectOrgList 설 명 : 현재학기 강의 기관 목록 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT T.ORG_ID , T.ORGNM FROM (
) T WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT OFRNG JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT CHRT ON CHRT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = OFRNG.SMSTR_CHRT_ID WHERE CHRT.NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' AND OFRNG.PROF_ID = #{userId} AND CHRT.ORG_ID = T.ORG_ID )
